Description:
Ballistics of the 9M117M <<Kan>> gun-launched anti-tank guided missile, fired from the 2A70 gun as the 3UBK10M-3.

Missile weighs 19.8 kg. Launch device loads 325 gram of 7-perforated V/A pyroxylin as launch charge, split into six charge bags, arranged radially. Central firing tube loads a certain mass of single perforated grains.

As Tested (Chinese formulation, 8/7-1/01)
T.	v_0	P_m (copper crusher gauge)
	m/s	MPa
-40	212.6	51.3
 20	224.3	68.2
 50	226.1	73.3	

After launch, the booster runs for 6 seconds, develops 360 m/s. The missile coasts to its maximum range of 4km in 13.9 seconds under standard conditions. Missile penetrates 600 of armor at 90 degrees, and 300 mm of armor at 60 degrees, static probability 60%, dynamic probability 50%. Warhead includes precursor charge 9Zh54 and main charge 9Zh92-1. Overload hardened to 3500 g0 axial and 500 g0 radial.

References:
- 张红青，郭利强《3UBK10M-3 炮射导弹总体结构》（304厂）
- 郭德惠，韩小红，吴虹《100mm炮射导弹发射装药分析》（845厂）
